## Checklist
- [ ] PR name and commits are descriptive, imperative, and atomic (trivial commits squashed)
- [ ] Follows Tailwind/shadcn best practices per README; no hardcoded color or spacing values
- [ ] Verified implementation matches Zeplin designs and screenshots are attached
- [ ] Screens render correctly on mobile and desktop; no browser console warnings or errors
- [ ] Requested a review from Claude and addressed its suggestions (or documented disagreements)
- [ ] Requested a review from the PL and relevant devs
